info.title: MTG Life Counter
info.author: brenzodotdev
info.description: Magic the gathering EDH life counter
info.details:
A touch-only Commander life counter for the Nintendo Switch, built with SDL2 and devkitPro. Made for handheld / tabletop mode.
Features
- Up to 6 players
- Track commander damage for all players
- Tap the right half of a tile to add life, the left half to subtract
- The screen is always active while playing for convenience
- See addition and deduction deltas while adding or removing life
